Net() - Constructor for class pl.AWTGameEngine.objects.GameObject.Net
 
NetBlock - Class in pl.AWTGameEngine.objects.net
NetBlock is used as a frame to transport data through the network.
Structure is simple: IDENTIFIER;COMPONENT;DATA
Where:
IDENTIFIER is GameObject's identifier,
COMPONENT is component's name (/w package),
DATA is data which is being sent
╚ is a standard delimiter for data, which allows to send more than one information to component - use method formData to add delimiters
NetBlock() - Constructor for class pl.AWTGameEngine.objects.net.NetBlock
 
NetBlock(String, Class<? extends ObjectComponent>, Object...) - Constructor for class pl.AWTGameEngine.objects.net.NetBlock
 
NetBlock(String, Class<? extends ObjectComponent>, String) - Constructor for class pl.AWTGameEngine.objects.net.NetBlock
 
NetComponent - Class in pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base
NetComponent is a class which inherits from ObjectComponent and contains events which are common for components which works in the network (e.g. onClientConnect, onSynchronize, onNetUpdate).
NetComponent(GameObject) - Constructor for class pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base.NetComponent
